verses:
kŠĻõŠĻ£ŠĻáa govinda hare, gopńę‚čÖvallabha Ňõaure

ŇõrńęnivńĀsa dńĀmodara Ňõrńę‚čÖrńĀma murńĀre

nanda‚čÖnandana mńĀdhava nŠĻõsiŇčha kaŠĻĀsńĀre
en_translation:
O KŠĻõŠĻ£ŠĻáa, O Govinda, O Hare! O Beloved of the gopńęs, O Scion of the ŇöŇęra dynasty!

O Abode of the Goddess of Fortune, O DńĀmodara! O Lord RńĀma, O Enemy of the Mura demon!

O Son of Nanda, O MńĀdhava! O NŠĻõsiŠĻĀha, O Enemy of KaŠĻĀsa!
